hooks.command: cd /home/user/baseball-leagure-manager && ./node_modules/.bin/biome check . 2>&1 || echo 'HOOK_FAILED: lint check failed. Run bun run lint:fix to fix issues.'
cd /home/user/baseball-leagure-manager && ./node_modules/.bin/biome format --check . 2>&1 || echo 'HOOK_FAILED: format check failed. Run bun run format to fix issues.'
cd /home/user/baseball-leagure-manager && bun test --coverage 2>&1 || echo 'HOOK_FAILED: tests failed. Fix failing tests before completing the task.'
